io.mdudel.zenoh.purejava.wire

Packages that use io.mdudel.zenoh.purejava.wire
Package
Description
io.mdudel.zenoh.purejava.scouting
 
io.mdudel.zenoh.purejava.session
 
io.mdudel.zenoh.purejava.wire
 
io.mdudel.zenoh.purejava.wire.messages
 
  • Classes in io.mdudel.zenoh.purejava.wire used by io.mdudel.zenoh.purejava.scouting
    Class
    Description
    WhatAmI
    The role of a Zenoh node, as encoded in the low 2 bits of the length/WhatAmI byte inside INIT and OPEN messages.
    WhatAmIMatcher
    Scouting-side role matcher bitmap.
    ZenohId
    Zenoh node identifier.
  • Classes in io.mdudel.zenoh.purejava.wire used by io.mdudel.zenoh.purejava.session
    Class
    Description
    Encoding
    The Zenoh Encoding field carried inside a Put payload.
    KeyExpr
    Zenoh key expression: a string with wildcard semantics matching the spec at zenoh.io/docs/manual/abstractions.
    Timestamp
    A Zenoh HLC (Hybrid Logical Clock) timestamp carried inside a Put or as a network-level Timestamp extension.
    ZenohId
    Zenoh node identifier.
  • Classes in io.mdudel.zenoh.purejava.wire used by io.mdudel.zenoh.purejava.wire
    Class
    Description
    Encoding
    The Zenoh Encoding field carried inside a Put payload.
    Extension
    Zenoh extension (TLV chain element).
    Extension.Encoding
    Encoding tag: the shape of the extension body.
    KeyExpr
    Zenoh key expression: a string with wildcard semantics matching the spec at zenoh.io/docs/manual/abstractions.
    RBuf
    Read-side byte buffer with a cursor.
    Timestamp
    A Zenoh HLC (Hybrid Logical Clock) timestamp carried inside a Put or as a network-level Timestamp extension.
    VarInt.Decoded
    Result of a VarInt.decode(byte[], int) call: the value, and where the cursor stopped.
    WBuf
    Growable write-side byte buffer used by the codec.
    WhatAmI
    The role of a Zenoh node, as encoded in the low 2 bits of the length/WhatAmI byte inside INIT and OPEN messages.
    WhatAmIMatcher
    Scouting-side role matcher bitmap.
    ZenohId
    Zenoh node identifier.
